message.content: {"items":[{"title":"GLES 2013 – German Longitudinal Election Study, Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey (GLES 2013, Campaign Panel)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11945","justification":"Central political survey for the 2013 federal election in Germany; covers political attitudes, party preferences, campaign exposure in the 2010s."},{"title":"GLES 2017 – German Longitudinal Election Study, Pre- and Post-election Cross-Section 2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13011","justification":"Major dataset on political attitudes and vote choice in Germany around the 2017 federal election, clearly within the 2010s."},{"title":"GLES 2009–2013–2017 Long-term Panel (German Longitudinal Election Study)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13201","justification":"Panel study tracking individuals across multiple federal elections including 2013 and 2017, allowing analysis of political change in Germany during the 2010s."},{"title":"Politbarometer 2010 (Cumulation)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11159","justification":"Monthly political opinion polls in Germany in 2010, including vote intentions and evaluations of parties and politicians."},{"title":"Politbarometer 2013 (Cumulation)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11731","justification":"Cumulative political opinion survey data for Germany in 2013, covering party preferences and political issues during the 2010s."},{"title":"Politbarometer 2017 (Cumulation)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12804","justification":"Key political opinion data for Germany surrounding the 2017 federal election, capturing public sentiment and party support in the late 2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2010","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11084","justification":"National survey including extensive modules on political attitudes, political interest and participation in Germany in 2010."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2014","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12204","justification":"Includes political trust, satisfaction with democracy and attitudes toward parties and institutions in Germany in the mid‑2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2018","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13284","justification":"Covers a broad range of political attitudes and behaviors in Germany in 2018, relevant to politics in the late 2010s."},{"title":"European Social Survey (ESS) Round 8 – Germany, 2016","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12660","justification":"German subsample of ESS 2016, including political interest, trust, party choice and attitudes to democracy in Germany during the 2010s."}]}
